name: ecommerce
description: Manage ecommerce — create/update a category, create categories in batch, activate the ecommerce app. Supports standard CRUD operations through the REST API.

parameters.name: deletedAt
parameters.description: UTC date-time (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.SSSZ) of the category deleted from the shop's database

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique Category ID as saved in the shop

parameters.name: isDeleted
parameters.description: category deleted from the shop's database

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: **Mandatory in case of creation**. Name of the Category, as displayed in the shop

parameters.name: updateEnabled
parameters.description: Facilitate to update the existing category in the same request (updateEnabled = true)
